name: OpenBuild
fullText:
AI is evolving faster than ever. From OpenClaw, a new breed of "digital employee" that can independently navigate browsers, to the quiet rise of an AI‑driven agent economy. So when high‑performance Layer 2 meets AI, what comes next for on‑chain finance?
